results.title: New Oklahoma state law aims to support childcare facilities following federal funding cuts
results.description: Following the end of federal COVID-era childcare subsidies, many centers across the state were struggling to make ends meet. While the state of Oklahoma does not have the money to make up the federal funding, they're hoping this new state law will help.

results.title: Pakistan warns of cyber, climate threats to peacekeepers on UN observance day
results.description: Pakistan on Friday paid tribute to United Nations peacekeepers serving around the world, saying modern conflicts were becoming increasingly complex and warning that peacekeeping missions now face challenges ranging from cyber threats and misinformation to climate-driven humanitarian emergencies. The statements came as the international community marked the International Day of United Nations Peacekeepers, observed annually [...]
